articles.headline: Schools are using AI counselors to track students’ mental health. Is it safe?
articles.description: As hundreds of schools implement an automated monitoring tool, educators say that students can find talking to chatbots ‘more natural’ than confiding in a human• Produced in partnership with EdSurgeThe alert came around 7pm.Brittani Phillips checked her phone. A middle school counselor in Putnam county, Florida, Phillips receives messages from an artificial intelligence-enabled therapy platform that students use during nonschool hours. It flags when a student may be at risk for harming themself or others based on what the student types into a chat. Continue reading...

articles.headline: Alibaba Releases OpenSandbox to Provide Software Developers with a Unified, Secure, and Scalable API for Autonomous AI Agent Execution
articles.description: Alibaba has released OpenSandbox, an open-source tool designed to provide AI agents with secure, isolated environments for code execution, web browsing, and model training. Released under the Apache 2.0 license, the proposed system targets to standardize the ‘execution layer’ of the AI agent stack, offering a unified API that functions across various programming languages and […] The post Alibaba Releases OpenSandbox to Provide Software Developers with a Unified, Secure, and Scalable API for Autonomous AI Agent Execution appeared first on MarkTechPost.

articles.headline: Pinterest shares pop 8% as activist Elliott Management takes $1 billion stake
articles.description: Pinterest's stock has plummeted this year as the social media company grapples with slowing growth and advertising competition.

articles.headline: Nvidia’s spending $4 billion on photonics to stay ahead of the curve in AI
articles.description: Nvidia announced on Monday that it's investing $2 billion each into Lumentum and Coherent, which are both developing photonics technology for data centers, like optical transceivers, circuit switches, and lasers, which are used to move data at high speeds over long distances. Their tech could improve energy efficiency, data transfer speeds, and bandwidth in future […]

articles.headline: Qualcomm CEO sees robotics as a 'larger opportunity' within 2 years
articles.description: It comes shortly after Qualcomm launched a processor under the Dragonwing brand name designed for robots.

software_engineering.headline: Schools Deploy AI Counselors for Student Mental Health Monitoring
software_engineering.what_changed: Hundreds of schools are now using AI-powered therapy platforms to monitor students' mental health and flag potential risks.
software_engineering.why_care: You should be aware of the ethical and privacy implications when developing or integrating AI systems that handle sensitive personal data, especially for vulnerable populations.
software_engineering.what_to_do: Review your organization's data privacy and security policies to ensure they adequately address AI-driven data collection and analysis.

software_engineering.headline: Alibaba Launches OpenSandbox for Secure AI Agent Code Execution
software_engineering.what_changed: Alibaba released OpenSandbox, an open-source tool providing a secure, unified API for AI agent code execution, web browsing, and model training.
software_engineering.why_care: This tool offers a standardized, isolated environment for your AI agents, which can simplify development and enhance security for your AI-driven applications.
software_engineering.what_to_do: Explore OpenSandbox on GitHub to see how its unified API and secure execution environments can benefit your AI agent development workflows.

software_engineering.headline: Activist Investor Elliott Management Takes $1 Billion Stake in Pinterest
software_engineering.what_changed: Activist investor Elliott Management has acquired a $1 billion stake in Pinterest, causing an 8% pop in its stock.
software_engineering.why_care: While not directly technical, significant investor actions can influence a company's strategic direction, potentially impacting future platform changes or API stability if you integrate with Pinterest.
software_engineering.what_to_do: Monitor Pinterest's official developer blogs and announcements for any upcoming changes to their platform or APIs that might result from new strategic directions.

software_engineering.why_care: This investment signals future advancements in data center infrastructure, which will impact the performance, scalability, and cost-efficiency of your cloud-based AI workloads.
software_engineering.what_to_do: Research upcoming photonics advancements to understand how they might influence your future infrastructure planning and optimization for high-performance computing.

software_engineering.headline: Qualcomm CEO Predicts Robotics as a Major Opportunity Within Two Years
software_engineering.what_changed: Qualcomm's CEO believes robotics will become a 'larger opportunity' within two years, following the launch of their Dragonwing processor for robots.
